channel.title: Authors on Takuya Kobayashi
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Takuya Kobayashi

item.description: I’m a first year Master’s student who belongs to Professor Aoki’s laboratory at Keio University. Though I belong to the Department of Electronic Engineering, I am majoring in Computer Vision topics. More specifically, my main research topic is human action recognition/ segmentation using fine-grained videos. I used to live in Singapore for 4years in my childhood, so I have no hesitation speaking English. As my hobby, I like playing baseball, going to the gym for training, and traveling foreign countrys.
